announcements.title: The 1.2.2 Update is now Released!
announcements.summary: Install the new update from our Discord Server! VIP Users check your emails!
announcements.body:
The official 1.2.2 update for Madfut 26 has dropped, and we are thrilled to release our matching Madfutx update alongside it. I’ve worked tirelessly to bring you massive changes, crucial bug fixes, and game-changing features to what we firmly believe is the best mod in the world.

🛠️ Bug Fixes & Stability
• Squads Fix: Resolved the bug occurring when adding players to 'My Squads'.
• Crash Resolution: Fixed all known in-app crashes for a smoother, flawless experience.

✨ New Mod Features
• Auto-Complete Evolutions
• Draft & Draft Duos Weekly Points Setter
• Disable Walkout Animations
• Always Full Chemistry for Squads
• Overpowered Drafts
• Custom Free Pack Output & Free Pack Score Spoofer
• Profile Stats Editor
• Unlock All Achievements
• Auto-Complete All Past DOTD (Draft of the Day)
• Max Fatal Season Rewards

💎 Get the Mod
Both the Free and VIP versions are available now! To celebrate this massive release, the VIP version is currently ON SALE.

announcements.title: Our Mod Updates Have Gone Live!
announcements.summary: You can now download the most advanced version of the Madfutx Mod
announcements.body:
We are so excited for you to try our brand new mod! This is just the start of the features we will be implementing.

You can grab the VIP version of this Mod if you'd like to play online, save your progress and use our trading mod features by clicking the button below.

Thank you all for the support and making this possible.

announcements.title: Welcome to MFX Mod
announcements.summary: Pay attention to announcements, news drops almost everyday!
announcements.body:
Welcome to the BEST mod ever released, seriously!

I hope you make the most of all the features i've taken time to build for you, it's been so fun to create experiences for you in MadFUT to enjoy.

I'll be posting announcements frequently, so be sure to check here everyday!
